quote.text: It’s about the team. Individual awards are great, but winning with your teammates is what matters most.
quote.author: Andrew Gaze
quote.attribution: Public Interview / Australian Basketball Hall of Fame

micro_action.task: Pass the ball to a teammate in a better position today.

quote.text: You have to be willing to do the work when nobody is looking. That's where champions are made.
quote.author: Lauren Jackson

micro_action.task: Do 10 minutes of solo practice today.

quote.text: I just wanted to be the best teammate I could be and help the team win championships.
quote.author: Luc Longley

micro_action.task: Encourage a teammate who just made a mistake.

quote.text: Representing your culture and where you come from gives you a strength that nothing else can.
quote.author: Patty Mills

micro_action.task: Drink a glass of water before you head to school.

quote.text: Resilience is not a solo sport. We all need people to lean on when things get tough.
quote.author: Madison de Rozario

micro_action.task: Ask a friend or teammate how their day is going.

quote.text: Focus on your own performance and control the controllables. The rest will take care of itself.
quote.author: Jessica Fox

micro_action.task: Take 5 deep breaths before your next training session.

quote.text: I'm just Sam. I go out there and play the game I love with my mates.
quote.author: Sam Kerr

micro_action.task: Clean your boots or sneakers after practice.

quote.text: I love the challenge of competing. It doesn't matter what the sport is, it's about the contest.
quote.author: Ellyse Perry

micro_action.task: Eat a piece of fruit with breakfast today.

quote.text: Respect your opponent, but never fear them. Everyone is beatable if you play your best.
quote.author: Ash Barty

micro_action.task: Say 'Good morning' to 3 people at school today.

quote.text: I'm not perfect, I'm just human. I make mistakes, but I learn from them and move on.
quote.author: Ian Thorpe

micro_action.task: Write down one thing you learned from a mistake this week.

quote.text: The only way to achieve the impossible is to believe it is possible.
quote.author: Charles Kingsleigh

micro_action.task: Try a move or trick you thought was too hard today.

quote.text: A trophy carries dust. Memories last forever.
quote.author: Mary Lou Retton

micro_action.task: Take a photo with your team or a teammate today.

quote.text: If you don't have a dream, you have nothing to work for. If you don't have a goal, you have nothing to reach for.
quote.author: Jackie Joyner-Kersee

micro_action.task: Drink 2 liters of water today.

quote.text: I hated every minute of training, but I said, 'Don't quit. Suffer now and live the rest of your life as a champion.'
quote.author: Muhammad Ali

micro_action.task: Finish every rep of your workout today.

quote.text: Winning is a habit. Unfortunately, so is losing.
quote.author: Vince Lombardi

micro_action.task: Pack your bag perfectly for tomorrow.

quote.text: Don't count the days, make the days count.
quote.author: Muhammad Ali

micro_action.task: Do one kind act for a teacher or coach today.

quote.text: The mind is the limit. As long as the mind can envision the fact that you can do something, you can do it.
quote.author: Arnold Schwarzenegger

micro_action.task: Visualize yourself succeeding at a difficult skill for 2 minutes.

quote.text: You have to expect things of yourself before you can do them.
quote.author: Michael Jordan

micro_action.task: Eat two servings of fruit today.

quote.text: Excellence is not a singular act, but a habit. You are what you repeatedly do.
quote.author: Aristotle (attributed)

micro_action.task: Always use 'Please' when asking for something today.

quote.text: Do not let what you cannot do interfere with what you can do.
quote.author: John Wooden

micro_action.task: Drink a glass of water before every meal.

quote.text: A champion is someone who gets up when they can't.
quote.author: Jack Dempsey

micro_action.task: If you fall or fail today, stand up and try again within 10 seconds.

quote.text: Your love for the game should be greater than your fear of failure.
quote.author: Traditional Sports Proverb

micro_action.task: Tell a teammate why you enjoy playing with them.

quote.text: The harder you work, the harder it is to surrender.
quote.author: Vince Lombardi

micro_action.task: Keep your effort high even when the score is against you.

quote.text: It's not the size of the dog in the fight, it's the size of the fight in the dog.
quote.author: Mark Twain (attributed)

micro_action.task: Use your voice to cheer for your team today.

quote.text: Obstacles don't have to stop you. If you run into a wall, don't turn around and give up.
quote.author: Michael Jordan

micro_action.task: Find a way around a problem you face today.

quote.text: Gold medals aren't really made of gold. They're made of sweat, determination, and a hard-to-find alloy called guts.
quote.author: Dan Gable

micro_action.task: Drink 1.5 liters of water today.

quote.text: There are no shortcuts to any place worth going.
quote.author: Beverly Sills

mantra: The long way is the right way.

micro_action.task: Have a piece of fruit as a snack.

quote.text: Character is how you treat those who can do nothing for you.
quote.author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe (attributed)

micro_action.task: Help a younger or less experienced player today.

quote.text: Set your goals high, and don't stop till you get there.
quote.author: Bo Jackson

micro_action.task: Review your goals and update them if needed.

quote.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
quote.author: Winston Churchill (attributed)

micro_action.task: Celebrate reaching 150 days of growth!
